profile.topic_order: placement-driven with interleaving when overlap exists

linux.shell-basics.note: id vs ip solid; journalctl/is-enabled syntax still shaky

linux.permissions.note: Octal recall solid; scenario cause ok; directory w nuance still partial

linux.logs.note: journalctl introduced; -n flag syntax needs practice

net.ip-addressing.note: /24 recall solid; gateway vs local subnet reasoning correct

net.tcp-udp.note: TCP named in MCQ; not in curl walkthrough

net.dns.note: A record and resolver diagnosis solid; gateway vs DNS still conflated

net.diagnostics.note: DNS troubleshoot flow ok; ss/resolv.conf fluent

net.http-tls.note: Web server named; TLS/HTTP steps missing

misconceptions.issue: Hard link = same inode, no cross-filesystem; symlink = pointer path
DNS resolves names→IPs; gateway routes packets (8.8.8.8 is DNS, not a gateway)
w on directory = create/delete/rename entries; w on file = edit contents

strong_areas: DNS diagnosis instinct and command sequencing

next_session.title: Processes, signals + journalctl
next_session.after_lecture: retrieval quiz on SIGTERM/SIGKILL, kill/pstree, journalctl -u/-n/-f
